title: AI_OS Night Supervisor Safety Policy
authority_note: This policy is subordinate to RISK_POLICY.md and AGENTS.md. If it conflicts with root authority, the stricter safety rule wins. This policy does not grant APPLY, commit, push, merge, runtime mutation, trading, or secret-handling authority.
forbidden_write_note: Any path outside allowed_write_roots is forbidden for night supervision runtime writes. Resume records and runtime snapshots are sandboxed under telemetry/night_supervisor/ until a separate approved packet promotes them to a canonical runtime location.

auto_approval_rules.note: Night supervision only PLANS approval routing in DRY_RUN. It never changes approval state. Even LOW-risk auto-approval requires a separate approved APPLY packet before any state change.
